prompt: Create a minimalist and luxurious poster for a milestone birthday, featuring a giant 3D number '[AGE]' carved into a high-end ivory white wall. An elegant person is sitting, leaning, or naturally hanging from the number, striking a confident pose. Elegant floral arrangements of white roses, baby's breath, hydrangeas, and pastel blue balloons frame the composition. Soft natural sunlight, high-end editorial photography, modern celebration aesthetic, clean luxury design, subtle shadows, sophisticated typography. At the top, display the name '[NAME]' in an elegant serif font, followed by 'CHAPTER [AGE]' and the quote '365 More Days of Miracles.' Neutral beige and white color palette, high-end event style, dreamy atmosphere, photorealistic, magazine-quality portrait, ultra-detailed textures, luxury birthday photo shoot, Instagram-worthy, shallow depth of field, soft lighting, 8K masterpiece, professional fashion photography.
